About KTC

Your Trusted Partner in Construction & Industry

Kiungani Trading Co. Ltd (KTC) is a leading super dealer of construction and industrial products in Dar es Salaam, Tanzania. Located at Skukuu House No:9, Gerezani Area, we serve contractors, builders, and businesses with a comprehensive range of quality products.

From foundation to finishing — generators, water pumps, power tools, steel, pipes and hardware. Everything you need, all in one place.

🏆
Authorized DealerPedrollo, Shimge & top brands
📦
Bulk SupplyWholesale & retail available
🚚
Fast DeliveryPrompt service across DSM
💬
Expert AdviceKnowledgeable team on-site
Our Products

Everything You Need
to Build & Operate

The KTC Advantage

01

One-Stop Shop

Everything from foundations to generators under one roof. Save time and simplify your procurement.

Competitive Pricing
